title: /kernel
summary_text: No full repo-local launcher exists for GLM or specialist providers to run without external PATH binaries. - `[scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh)`: default `GLM_BIN` is `${KERNEL_GLM_BIN:-glm}` and checked with `command -v`. If missing, it can still run via API fallback (`run_glm_api_fallback`) using `curl`/`jq`/`ZAI_API_KEY`, so GLM can work without `glm` binary unless `KERNEL_GLM_SUBSCRIBED=true` (that path exits on missing command). - `[scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh)`: provider commands default to plain binaries (`gemini`, `cursor`, `copilot`) with only `copilot` having `gh` as an alternate; otherwise it requires `command -v` success and direct execution. - `[scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh)`: readiness checks use `command -v` for `gemini`/`cursor` and (`copilot` or `gh`), i.e., no local fallback launcher is provided. - `[scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-launch.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-launch.sh)`: does not provide specialist-voice bootstrap; it only resolves the main kernel binary.
